title: GitHub - jezmn/hanesu: Experimental workflow layer for AI coding agents
excerpt: Experimental workflow layer for AI coding agents. Contribute to jezmn/hanesu development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
Why Hanesu

Hanesu is an experimental workflow layer for AI coding agents.

It applies ideas from Harness Engineering to repository-level software work: instead of asking an agent to code from one long prompt, Hanesu gives it a visible process made of task files, phases, role handoffs, quality gates, and progress artifacts.

Hanesu does not replace tools like OpenCode, Codex, Claude Code, or other agent runtimes. It sits inside your repo and gives those agents a small control layer for moving through work more predictably.

It is not meant for every task. For small, obvious edits, a direct prompt plus code search is usually faster. Hanesu is most useful for ambiguous, risky, or multi-step work where you want the agent to search first, write artifacts, stop at human gates, and verify before calling the task done.

The workflow borrows from Spec-Driven Development and Test-Driven Development: search for context, define intent, write scenarios or tests, implement, review, and verify.

Principles

  • Workflow over improvisation. The agent follows a defined path, not a long free-form chat.
  • Context before code. Search comes before reading or editing source files.
  • Artifacts over memory. Important decisions are written down, not buried in chat history.
  • Gates where judgment matters. Human review appears at risky or semantic points.
  • Rigor proportional to risk. Features, bugfixes, patches, refactors, and audits use different flows.
  • Verification before completion. A task is not done until the required checks pass.
  • Small harness, large project. Hanesu should guide the run without becoming the main work.
  • Portable by design. The workflow lives in repo files so different agents can follow it.
  • Roles are ephemeral. Enter a phase, write the artifact, exit.
  • Diagnose before fix, plan before refactor.
  • Diff review before verify. Every applied change is assessed for risk before final verification.
  • Clean-tree checkpoint before edit. If the working tree is dirty, stop for human review before changing files.
  • Smoke test in verify. Tests alone don't prove the app works.
  • Risk-based gates for patch. Security, models, deps, and >2 files trigger human review.

Quick start

# In your project directory
npx create-hanesu
# Creates .hanesu/ + AGENTS.md
npx create-hanesu --update
# Updates an existing .hanesu/ from the latest template

Configuration

After init, customize these files:

File What to change
.hanesu/config.md project preferences, workarounds, and conventions
.hanesu/feature.json your feature backlog (feature/bugfix/patch/refactor/audit)
.hanesu/prompts/<id>.prompt task description, logs, error output, links

Project stack and architecture go in AGENTS.md (below the Hanesu header) or in a separate ARCHITECTURE.md at root.

How It Works

One task at a time. Pipeline selected by type.

The agent starts from AGENTS.md, reads the compact workflow definition, checks the current task in .hanesu/feature.json, then runs the first phase: context-scout.

context-scout searches the codebase before any role reads source. The next role receives a small candidate file list instead of exploring the repository blindly.

Why One Agent At A Time

Hanesu is intentionally sequential.

  1. Fresh context for real work. The orchestrator stays lightweight and only coordinates. Roles like spec, implementation, diagnosis, and review can run with focused instructions and a small handoff.

  2. Deterministic handoff. Parallel agents can race on files, tests, and current.json. Sequential execution keeps the system debuggable: write artifact -> update status -> next role reads.

State Model

Two files track task progress. No overlap.

feature.json — the backlog

Decides what to work on. Lists all tasks with lifecycle status only.

Field Values Meaning
id f1, f2, ... Task identifier
type feature, bugfix, patch, refactor, audit Pipeline selector
status pending, done, blocked Lifecycle status. Gates and in-progress phase state live in current.json

current.json — the session

Decides where the work is. Single task, real-time phase tracking.

{
  "id": "f1",
  "type": "feature",
  "phase": "search",
  "status": "running",
  "attempt": 1,
  "gate": { "type": "none", "reason": "none" }
}
Field Values Meaning
phase Pipeline phase from workflow.md Where in the pipeline
status running, done, failed, blocked Phase sub-status
attempt 1, 2, ... Retry counter (judge reject, verify fail)
gate { type, reason } Human gate blocker

Flow

feature.json decides what to work on.
current.json decides where the work is.
workflow.md decides what comes next and which role owns each phase.

The first persisted phase is always search.

Daily Workflow

1. Define a task

Edit .hanesu/feature.json to register the task:

{
  "features": [
    { "id": "f1", "type": "feature", "status": "pending" },
    { "id": "f2", "type": "bugfix", "status": "pending" },
    { "id": "f3", "type": "patch", "status": "pending" },
    { "id": "f4", "type": "refactor", "status": "pending" },
    { "id": "f5", "type": "audit", "status": "pending" }
  ]
}

Then write the real request in the matching prompt file:

.hanesu/prompts/f1.prompt

Use the prompt for logs, acceptance notes, error output, links, and constraints.

2. Tell the AI

Implement f1 using Hanesu.

The orchestrator reads AGENTS.md, .hanesu/workflow.md, .hanesu/feature.json, and the matching .hanesu/prompts/<id>.prompt. It selects the pipeline by type from workflow.md and executes.

3. Follow the pipeline

Each mode has its own flow, but ALL start with search. workflow.md is the canonical phase map and lists the owning role for every phase explicitly:

feature
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. spec - owner: spec-partner
3. gherkin - owner: gherkin-author - gate: human approval before tdd
4. tdd - owner: craftsman
5. judge - owner: judge
6. verify - owner: orchestrator

bugfix
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. diagnose - owner: craftsman
3. patch - owner: craftsman
4. verify - owner: orchestrator

patch
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. apply - owner: craftsman
3. verify - owner: orchestrator

refactor
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. plan - owner: craftsman - gate: human approval before test
3. test - owner: craftsman
4. refactor - owner: craftsman
5. verify - owner: orchestrator

audit
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. scan - owner: audit
3. report - owner: audit

Mutation testing is an optional report-only hook after judge or verify; it writes a report without changing current.json phase.

4. Check artifacts

Common outputs:

.hanesu/progress/scout/context_<id>.json
.hanesu/progress/diagnosis/diagnosis_<id>.md
.hanesu/progress/diff/diff_<id>.md         ← diff review output (risk assessment)
.hanesu/progress/judge/judge_<id>.md
.hanesu/progress/mutation/mutation_<id>.md
.hanesu/progress/refactor/plan_<id>.md
.hanesu/progress/audit/audit_<id>.md

Feature specs and Gherkin scenarios are written to:

.hanesu/specs/<id>.md
.hanesu/features/<id>.feature

5. Rinse

Task reaches done. Orchestrator picks next pending task.

Updating Hanesu

Run npx create-hanesu --update from a project that already has .hanesu/. It refreshes framework-owned files: roles/ and workflow.md. It preserves project state and authored work: config.md, prompts, features, progress, specs, and feature.json.

Roles

Role What it does
orchestrator Coordinates pipelines, gates, checkpoints, diff review, and verify + smoke
context-scout Searches codebase before any role reads source (step 0)
spec-partner Clarifies intent and writes spec
gherkin-author Writes .feature files from spec
craftsman Implements (TDD), diagnoses bugs, applies fixes
judge Reviews implementation against spec/gherkin, approves or rejects
mutation-tester Optional — validates test quality on critical logic
audit Read-only scan/report for audit pipeline

Adding a role

Drop a .md file in .hanesu/roles/ with:

  • CAN / CANNOT sections
  • Workflow
  • Output format (handoff JSON template)

Add the role to the appropriate pipeline in workflow.md. Orchestrator spawns it when the pipeline step is reached.

Inspiration

Inspired by spec-first AI coding workflows and Robert C. Martin's SwarmForge.

Tips

  • Pair Hanesu with caveman — cuts output tokens ~65%.
  • Pair Hanesu with codebase-memory MCP — context-scout uses it for structural search.

Recommended agent skills

The template references these skills via if exists — optional, enhances sub-agent behavior:

Skill Role What it adds
systematic-debugging craftsman (diagnose) Root cause protocol before fixing bugs
caveman-review judge Terse one-line review format

It sits inside your repo and gives those agents a small control layer for moving through work more predictably. It is not meant for every task. For small, obvious edits, a direct prompt plus code search is usually faster. Hanesu is most useful for ambiguous, risky, or multi-step work where you want the agent to search first, write artifacts, stop at human gates, and verify before calling the task done. The workflow borrows from Spec-Driven Development and Test-Driven Development: search for context, define intent, write scenarios or tests, implement, review, and verify. blocks.html_en: Hanesu is an experimental workflow layer for AI coding agents.

sentences.en: Hanesu is an experimental workflow layer for AI coding agents.
sentences.zh: Hanesu 是 AI 编码代理的实验性工作流程层。

blocks.html_en: It applies ideas from Harness Engineering to repository-level software work: instead of asking an agent to code from one long prompt, Hanesu gives it a visible process made of task files, phases, role handoffs, quality gates, and progress artifacts.

sentences.en: It applies ideas from Harness Engineering to repository-level software work: instead of asking an agent to code from one long prompt, Hanesu gives it a visible process made of task files, phases, role handoffs, quality gates, and progress artifacts.
sentences.zh: 它将 Harness Engineering 的想法应用到存储库级软件工作中：Hanesu 不是要求代理根据一个长提示进行编码，而是为其提供一个由任务文件、阶段、角色切换、质量门和进度工件组成的可见流程。

blocks.html_en: Hanesu does not replace tools like OpenCode, Codex, Claude Code, or other agent runtimes. It sits inside your repo and gives those agents a small control layer for moving through work more predictably.

sentences.en: Hanesu does not replace tools like OpenCode, Codex, Claude Code, or other agent runtimes.
sentences.zh: Hanesu 不会取代 OpenCode、Codex、Claude Code 或其他代理运行时等工具。

sentences.en: It sits inside your repo and gives those agents a small control layer for moving through work more predictably.
sentences.zh: 它位于您的存储库内，并为这些代理提供了一个小型控制层，以便更可预测地完成工作。

blocks.html_en: It is not meant for every task. For small, obvious edits, a direct prompt plus code search is usually faster. Hanesu is most useful for ambiguous, risky, or multi-step work where you want the agent to search first, write artifacts, stop at human gates, and verify before calling the task done.

sentences.en: It is not meant for every task.
sentences.zh: 它并不适用于所有任务。

sentences.en: For small, obvious edits, a direct prompt plus code search is usually faster.
sentences.zh: 对于小的、明显的编辑，直接提示加代码搜索通常会更快。

sentences.en: Hanesu is most useful for ambiguous, risky, or multi-step work where you want the agent to search first, write artifacts, stop at human gates, and verify before calling the task done.
sentences.zh: Hanesu 对于不明确、有风险或多步骤的工作最有用，在这些工作中，您希望代理首先搜索、编写工件、在人员门口停止并在调用任务完成之前进行验证。

blocks.html_en: The workflow borrows from Spec-Driven Development and Test-Driven Development: search for context, define intent, write scenarios or tests, implement, review, and verify.

sentences.en: The workflow borrows from Spec-Driven Development and Test-Driven Development: search for context, define intent, write scenarios or tests, implement, review, and verify.
sentences.zh: 该工作流程借鉴了规范驱动开发和测试驱动开发：搜索上下文、定义意图、编写场景或测试、实施、审查和验证。

blocks.html_en: • Workflow over improvisation. The agent follows a defined path, not a long free-form chat.

sentences.zh: 工作流程胜过即兴创作。

sentences.en: The agent follows a defined path, not a long free-form chat.
sentences.zh: 代理遵循定义的路径，而不是长时间的自由聊天。

blocks.html_en: • Context before code. Search comes before reading or editing source files.

sentences.en: Search comes before reading or editing source files.
sentences.zh: 搜索发生在读取或编辑源文件之前。

blocks.html_en: • Artifacts over memory. Important decisions are written down, not buried in chat history.

sentences.en: Important decisions are written down, not buried in chat history.
sentences.zh: 重要的决定都会写下来，而不是埋在聊天记录中。

blocks.html_en: • Gates where judgment matters. Human review appears at risky or semantic points.

sentences.zh: 判断力至关重要的大门。

sentences.en: Human review appears at risky or semantic points.
sentences.zh: 人工审查出现在危险点或语义点。

blocks.html_en: • Rigor proportional to risk. Features, bugfixes, patches, refactors, and audits use different flows.

sentences.zh: 严格程度与风险成正比。

sentences.en: Features, bugfixes, patches, refactors, and audits use different flows.
sentences.zh: 功能、错误修复、补丁、重构和审核使用不同的流程。

blocks.html_en: • Verification before completion. A task is not done until the required checks pass.

sentences.en: A task is not done until the required checks pass.
sentences.zh: 只有通过所需的检查后，任务才算完成。

blocks.html_en: • Small harness, large project. Hanesu should guide the run without becoming the main work.

sentences.en: Hanesu should guide the run without becoming the main work.
sentences.zh: Hanesu应该引导跑步，而不是成为主要工作。

blocks.html_en: • Portable by design. The workflow lives in repo files so different agents can follow it.

sentences.en: The workflow lives in repo files so different agents can follow it.
sentences.zh: 工作流程存在于存储库文件中，因此不同的代理可以遵循它。

blocks.html_en: • Roles are ephemeral. Enter a phase, write the artifact, exit.

sentences.en: Enter a phase, write the artifact, exit.
sentences.zh: 进入一个阶段，写入工件，退出。

sentences.en: Diagnose before fix, plan before refactor.
sentences.zh: 修复前诊断，重构前规划。

blocks.html_en: • Diff review before verify. Every applied change is assessed for risk before final verification.

sentences.en: Every applied change is assessed for risk before final verification.
sentences.zh: 在最终验证之前，对每个应用的变更进行风险评估。

blocks.html_en: • Clean-tree checkpoint before edit. If the working tree is dirty, stop for human review before changing files.

sentences.en: If the working tree is dirty, stop for human review before changing files.
sentences.zh: 如果工作树脏了，请在更改文件之前停止进行人工检查。

blocks.html_en: • Smoke test in verify. Tests alone don't prove the app works.

sentences.en: Tests alone don't prove the app works.
sentences.zh: 仅靠测试并不能证明该应用程序有效。

blocks.html_en: • Risk-based gates for patch. Security, models, deps, and >2 files trigger human review.

sentences.en: Security, models, deps, and >2 files trigger human review.
sentences.zh: 安全性、模型、部门和 >2 个文件会触发人工审核。
初始化后，自定义这些文件：
项目偏好、解决方法和约定
您的功能待办事项（功能/错误修复/补丁/重构/审核）

sentences.en: task description, logs, error output, links
sentences.zh: 任务描述、日志、错误输出、链接

blocks.html_en: Project stack and architecture go in AGENTS.md (below the Hanesu header) or in a separate ARCHITECTURE.md at root.

sentences.en: Project stack and architecture go in AGENTS.md (below the Hanesu header) or in a separate ARCHITECTURE.md at root.
sentences.zh: 项目堆栈和架构位于 AGENTS.md（位于 Hanesu 标头下方）或位于根目录下的单独 ARCHITECTURE.md 中。

blocks.html_en: One task at a time. Pipeline selected by type.
The agent starts from AGENTS.md, reads the compact workflow definition, checks the current task in .hanesu/feature.json, then runs the first phase: context-scout.

sentences.en: The agent starts from AGENTS.md, reads the compact workflow definition, checks the current task in .hanesu/feature.json, then runs the first phase: context-scout.
sentences.zh: 代理从 AGENTS.md 开始，读取紧凑的工作流定义，检查 .hanesu/feature.json 中的当前任务，然后运行第一阶段：context-scout。

blocks.html_en: context-scout searches the codebase before any role reads source. The next role receives a small candidate file list instead of exploring the repository blindly.

sentences.en: context-scout searches the codebase before any role reads source.
sentences.zh: context-scout 在任何角色读取源代码之前都会搜索代码库。

sentences.en: The next role receives a small candidate file list instead of exploring the repository blindly.
sentences.zh: 下一个角色会收到一个小的候选文件列表，而不是盲目地探索存储库。

blocks.html_en: The template references these skills via if exists — optional, enhances sub-agent behavior:

sentences.en: Root cause protocol before fixing bugs
sentences.zh: 修复错误之前的根本原因协议

content_html_zh:
为什么选择羽宿

Hanesu 是 AI 编码代理的实验性工作流程层。

它将 Harness Engineering 的想法应用到存储库级软件工作中：Hanesu 不是要求代理根据一个长提示进行编码，而是为其提供一个由任务文件、阶段、角色切换、质量门和进度工件组成的可见流程。

Hanesu 不会取代 OpenCode、Codex、Claude Code 或其他代理运行时等工具。 它位于您的存储库内，并为这些代理提供了一个小型控制层，以便更可预测地完成工作。

它并不适用于所有任务。 对于小的、明显的编辑，直接提示加代码搜索通常会更快。 Hanesu 对于不明确、有风险或多步骤的工作最有用，在这些工作中，您希望代理首先搜索、编写工件、在人员门口停止并在调用任务完成之前进行验证。

该工作流程借鉴了规范驱动开发和测试驱动开发：搜索上下文、定义意图、编写场景或测试、实施、审查和验证。

原则

  • 工作流程胜过即兴创作。 代理遵循定义的路径，而不是长时间的自由聊天。
  • 代码之前的上下文。 搜索发生在读取或编辑源文件之前。
  • 文物超过记忆。 重要的决定都会写下来，而不是埋在聊天记录中。
  • 判断力至关重要的大门。 人工审查出现在危险点或语义点。
  • 严格程度与风险成正比。 功能、错误修复、补丁、重构和审核使用不同的流程。
  • 完成前验证。 只有通过所需的检查后，任务才算完成。
  • 小线束，大工程。 Hanesu应该引导跑步，而不是成为主要工作。
  • 便携式设计。 工作流程存在于存储库文件中，因此不同的代理可以遵循它。
  • 角色是短暂的。 进入一个阶段，写入工件，退出。
  • 修复前诊断，重构前规划。
  • 验证前进行差异审查。 在最终验证之前，对每个应用的变更进行风险评估。
  • 编辑前清理树检查点。 如果工作树脏了，请在更改文件之前停止进行人工检查。
  • 验证中的烟雾测试。 仅靠测试并不能证明该应用程序有效。
  • 基于风险的补丁门。 安全性、模型、部门和 >2 个文件会触发人工审核。

快速启动

# In your project directory
npx create-hanesu
# Creates .hanesu/ + AGENTS.md
npx create-hanesu --update
# Updates an existing .hanesu/ from the latest template

配置

初始化后，自定义这些文件：

File 改变什么
.hanesu/config.md 项目偏好、解决方法和约定
.hanesu/feature.json 您的功能待办事项（功能/错误修复/补丁/重构/审核）
.hanesu/prompts/<id>.prompt 任务描述、日志、错误输出、链接

项目堆栈和架构位于 AGENTS.md（位于 Hanesu 标头下方）或位于根目录下的单独 ARCHITECTURE.md 中。

它是如何运作的

一次一项任务。 按类型选择的管道。

代理从 AGENTS.md 开始，读取紧凑的工作流定义，检查 .hanesu/feature.json 中的当前任务，然后运行第一阶段：context-scout。

context-scout 在任何角色读取源代码之前都会搜索代码库。 下一个角色会收到一个小的候选文件列表，而不是盲目地探索存储库。

为什么一次只有一名代理人

Hanesu 是故意连续的。

  1. 真实工作的新鲜环境。 协调器保持轻量级并且仅协调。 规范、实施、诊断和审查等角色可以通过集中的指令和少量的交接来运行。
  2. 确定性切换。 并行代理可以在文件、测试和 current.json 上进行竞争。 顺序执行保持系统可调试：写入工件 -> 更新状态 -> 下一个角色读取。

状态模型

两个文件跟踪任务进度。 没有重叠。

feature.json — 待办事项

决定做什么工作。 仅列出具有生命周期状态的所有任务。

Field 价值观 意义
id f1, f2, ... 任务标识符
type 功能、错误修复、补丁、重构、审核 管道选择器
地位 待处理、已完成、已阻止 生命周期状态。 盖茨和进行中的阶段状态位于 current.json 中

current.json — 会话

决定工作地点。 单任务、实时阶段跟踪。

{
  "id": "f1",
  "type": "feature",
  "phase": "search",
  "status": "running",
  "attempt": 1,
  "gate": { "type": "none", "reason": "none" }
}
Field 价值观 意义
phase workflow.md 中的管道阶段 管道中的哪个位置
地位 运行、完成、失败、阻塞 阶段子状态
试图 1, 2, ... 重试计数器（判断拒绝、验证失败）
gate { 类型，原因 } 人体门阻滞剂

Flow

feature.json decides what to work on.
current.json decides where the work is.
workflow.md decides what comes next and which role owns each phase.

第一个持续阶段始终是搜索。

日常工作流程

1. 定义任务

编辑 .hanesu/feature.json 以注册任务：

{
  "features": [
    { "id": "f1", "type": "feature", "status": "pending" },
    { "id": "f2", "type": "bugfix", "status": "pending" },
    { "id": "f3", "type": "patch", "status": "pending" },
    { "id": "f4", "type": "refactor", "status": "pending" },
    { "id": "f5", "type": "audit", "status": "pending" }
  ]
}

然后在匹配的提示文件中写入真正的请求：

.hanesu/prompts/f1.prompt

使用日志、验收说明、错误输出、链接和约束的提示。

2. 告诉人工智能

Implement f1 using Hanesu.

Orchestrator 读取 AGENTS.md、.hanesu/workflow.md、.hanesu/feature.json 和匹配的 .hanesu/prompts/<id>.prompt。 它从工作流.md 中按类型选择管道并执行。

3. 遵循管道

每种模式都有自己的流程，但都从搜索开始。 workflow.md 是规范的阶段图，并明确列出了每个阶段的所属角色：

feature
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. spec - owner: spec-partner
3. gherkin - owner: gherkin-author - gate: human approval before tdd
4. tdd - owner: craftsman
5. judge - owner: judge
6. verify - owner: orchestrator

bugfix
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. diagnose - owner: craftsman
3. patch - owner: craftsman
4. verify - owner: orchestrator

patch
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. apply - owner: craftsman
3. verify - owner: orchestrator

refactor
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. plan - owner: craftsman - gate: human approval before test
3. test - owner: craftsman
4. refactor - owner: craftsman
5. verify - owner: orchestrator

audit
1. search - owner: context-scout
2. scan - owner: audit
3. report - owner: audit

突变测试是判断或验证后可选的仅报告挂钩；它会在不更改 current.json 阶段的情况下编写报告。

4. 检查工件

常见输出：

.hanesu/progress/scout/context_<id>.json
.hanesu/progress/diagnosis/diagnosis_<id>.md
.hanesu/progress/diff/diff_<id>.md         ← diff review output (risk assessment)
.hanesu/progress/judge/judge_<id>.md
.hanesu/progress/mutation/mutation_<id>.md
.hanesu/progress/refactor/plan_<id>.md
.hanesu/progress/audit/audit_<id>.md

功能规格和 Gherkin 场景写入：

.hanesu/specs/<id>.md
.hanesu/features/<id>.feature

5. Rinse

任务完成。 Orchestrator 选择下一个待处理任务。

更新哈内苏

从已有 .hanesu/ 的项目中运行 npx create-hanesu --update。 它刷新框架拥有的文件：roles/和workflow.md。 它保留项目状态和创作的工作：config.md、提示、功能、进度、规格和 feature.json。

Roles

Role 它的作用
协调者 协调管道、大门、检查点、差异审查和验证 + 烟雾
上下文侦察 在任何角色读取源代码之前搜索代码库（步骤 0）
规格合作伙伴 澄清意图并编写规范
小黄瓜作者 根据规范写入 .feature 文件
工匠 实施 (TDD)、诊断错误、应用修复
judge 根据规范/小黄瓜审查实施情况，批准或拒绝
突变测试仪 可选 - 验证关键逻辑的测试质量
audit 审计管道的只读扫描/报告

添加角色

将 .md 文件放入 .hanesu/roles/ 中：

  • CAN / CANNOT 部分
  • 工作流程
  • 输出格式（切换JSON模板）

将角色添加到workflow.md 中的相应管道中。 当到达管道步骤时，Orchestrator 会生成它。

灵感

受到规范优先的 AI 编码工作流程和 Robert C. 马丁的 SwarmForge。

Tips

  • Hanesu 与穴居人配对 — 减少产出代币约 65%。
  • 将 Hanesu 与代码库内存 MCP 配对 — context-scout 使用它进行结构搜索。

代理技能推荐

该模板通过 ifexists — 可选引用这些技能，增强了子代理的行为：

Skill Role 它添加了什么
系统调试 工匠（诊断） 修复错误之前的根本原因协议
穴居人评论 judge 简洁的一行评论格式
